zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Venables於1335年出生在英國英格蘭爾金德頓時，她的父親Hugh de Venables39歲，母親Katherine de Houghton27歲。她於1354年與Ralph de Hyde I在英國爾海德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年在英國享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Venables于1335年出生在英国英格兰爾金德頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables39岁，母亲Katherine de Houghton27岁。她于1354年与Ralph de Hyde I在英国爾海德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年在英国享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Venables was born in 1335, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 39 and her mother, Katherine de Houghton, was 27. She married Ralph de Hyde I in 1354, in Hyde, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1391, in England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Venables est née en 1335, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Houghton, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Hyde I en 1354, à Hyde, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1391, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Venables 1335 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 39 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Houghton 27. Sie hat 1354 in Hyde, Cheshire, England Ralph de Hyde I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1391 im Alter von 56 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Venables è nata il nel 1335 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Katherine de Houghton, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Hyde I nel 1354, nel Hyde, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1391, nel England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Venablesが1335年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは39歳，母Katherine de Houghtonは27歳であった。1354年にイギリスチェシュアイアハイドでRalph de Hyde Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年にイギリスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Venables(이)가 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Houghton(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1354년 영국 체실르 히드에서 Ralph de Hyde I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 영국에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Hyde, Cheshire, England: Hyde, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Venables nasceu em 1335, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Houghton, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Hyde I em 1354, em Hyde, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1391, em Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Venables родилась в 1335 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Houghton, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Hyde I в 1354 г. в местности хид, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1391 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Venables nació en 1335, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Katherine de Houghton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ralph de Hyde I en 1354, en Hyde, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1391, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
